name: Monkey Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Mix the sugar and cinnamon together.
3. Break apart the biscuits and coat them generously with the sugar mixture.
4. Place the biscuits in a greased baking dish.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Turn off the oven.
7. Serve warm.
